messages.text: I'm here for you. Whatever you need, whenever you need it. 🤗
Sending you love and strength during this difficult time. 💪❤️
You are not alone. I've got your back. 🫂
Take all the time you need to heal. I'll be here. ⏰
Some days will be harder than others. I'll be by your side through all of them. 📅
You're stronger than you know. But it's okay to not be okay. 🌱
I'm just a call away. Day or night. 📞
Sending you a virtual hug. Wish I could give you a real one. 🤗
You've got this. And I've got you. 💪
Let me carry some of your pain. You don't have to do this alone. 🎒
Better days are coming. Hold on. ☀️
I'm praying for you and thinking of you. 🙏
Your feelings are valid. Let yourself feel them. 💭
I'm so sorry you're going through this. I wish I could fix it. 🛠️
You are loved. You are important. You matter. 💖
This too shall pass. Until then, lean on me. 🧱
I'm not going anywhere. I promise. 📍
Let's get through this together. One day at a time. 🚶
You don't have to be strong all the time. I'll be strong for you. 🦸
I'm here to listen, not to judge. Tell me anything. 👂
Healing isn't linear. Some days will be setbacks. That's okay. 📉
I believe in you. Even when you don't believe in yourself. 🌟
You're not a burden. Let me help you. 🤲
Sometimes crying is healing. Let it out. 😭
I'm bringing you soup and hugs. No arguments. 🍲
You've survived 100% of your bad days so far. You'll survive this too. 💪
I'm grateful for you. Tell me what you need. 🙏
Let's find something to smile about today. Even if it's small. 😊
You are braver than you believe, stronger than you seem, and loved more than you know. 🦁
I'm here. And I'm not leaving. 🏠
It's okay to not have words right now. Just know I'm here. 🤐
You're handling this better than you think. 👏
Let me be your strength today. Tomorrow you can be mine. 🔄
I love you. No matter what. Through everything. ❤️
You're not alone in this. We've got this together. 👭
